name: Numeraire

supply.total_supply_cap_notes: Originally 21M, reduced to 11M in July 2019. All 11M minted; no new minting possible. Contract burned/immutable.
supply.locked_tokens_mechanism: Staked on dummy tournament round with 2028 resolve date; cryptographically locked in staking contract. Numerai cannot access until 2028.
supply.locked_tokens_notes: Released as reward incentive for tournament participants over time starting 2028

market.market_cap_notes: Variation across sources: $63.2M-$69.7M. Rank: #319-#331 by market cap.
market.aum_notes: Numerai hedge fund AUM grew from $60M to $550M in 3 years. JPMorgan secured $500M capacity August 2025. Target: $1B+ AUM.

unlocks.schedule_notes: 3M NMR locked until 2028. Released gradually as tournament reward incentives. No traditional investor vesting.
unlocks.concentration_notes: Numerai treasury holds ~3M locked NMR (27% of total supply). Upon 2028 unlock, phased release to participants could create supply pressure if not absorbed by tournament participation demand.

mechanism.description: Data scientists stake NMR as collateral on predictive AI models in weekly Numerai tournaments. Successful predictions earn NMR rewards from treasury. Failed predictions burn staked NMR permanently.
mechanism.staking_participants: Global network of data scientists competing in prediction tournaments
mechanism.staking_amount_notes: $7M worth of NMR staked (May 2025 ~$5.5M; grew to $7M+ by late 2025)
mechanism.weekly_cycle: Predictions resolved and rewards/burns distributed weekly
mechanism.burn_mechanism: Weekly burns occur on all unsuccessful model predictions. Removes tokens permanently from supply.
mechanism.reward_mechanism: Weekly rewards from Numerai treasury fund successful predictions. Treasury depletion risk acknowledged by Numerai; triggered $1M buyback July 2025.

inflation.minting_rule: All 11M tokens minted; contract immutable. Zero new issuance.
inflation.net_direction_notes: Weekly burns from failed predictions reduce circulating supply. Reward emissions offset by buybacks and natural burn pressure. Net effect: deflationary long-term.
inflation.emission_source: Tournament rewards distributed from locked treasury (3M pool until 2028)
inflation.burn_data_2025: Weekly burns confirmed but granular weekly burn rates not publicly disclosed. Treasury drawdown evident from $1M buyback initiated July 2025.

buyback_2025.purpose: Replenish treasury rewards pool; maintain economic stability; gradual market purchase via Coinbase Institutional
buyback_2025.notes: Suggests ongoing tournament rewards outpaced available treasury. Buyback commits to long-term token sustainability.

data_collection_notes: Research conducted April 29, 2026 using public sources: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, Coinbase, Kraken, Gate.io, Numerai official blog and announcements. No private/API data. Numerai docs (docs.numer.ai) network-blocked; data sourced from published announcements and third-party aggregators. Supply figures vary <1% across exchanges due to real-time tracking. Treasury concentration (3M locked + Numerai holdings of recent buyback) represents significant governance risk; 2028 unlock timing creates future supply event. Weekly burn data not granularly published; burn mechanism confirmed operational but exact weekly volumes require on-chain verification or tournament metrics access.
